title: Bewudy 300PCS Fake Rose Petals, Gold Silk Rose Petals, for Romantic Night Romantic Festive Atmosphere Creation for Marriage Proposal Wedding Valentine's Day Decoration Party Activities (Gold) (300)
features: 【High-Quality Material】Polyester silk material keeps our artificial rose petals from fading in the sun or liquid. It is very real, so it is very suitable for your courtship, party, or wedding decoration
【Easy to Use】To stick rose petals together, you need to separate the petals manually. Hold it tightly with your hand, and then rub it back and forth and it will spread out naturally
【Create A Romantic Atmosphere】We use high-quality materials to make fake rose petals to provide the best shopping experience. Let you and your partner spend the sweetest and most romantic evening

【Reusable】Our artificial rose petals can be reused. If the rose petals have a little smell, please spread them out and put them in water to separate the petals more easily. After the petals are completely dry, spray some perfume to create a more romantic atmosphere

【Widely Application】The gold rose petals can be used on Valentine's Day, weddings, honeymoons, anniversaries, birthdays, and various scenes where you want to create romantic love. It is very suitable for sprinkling on the wedding table or making roses, and it can also be used to decorate gifts
